identity.name: Titelli
identity.mission: Connect Lausanne's elite service providers with discerning clients through a seamless, high-end digital experience.

headings.usage: Main page titles, section headers, feature names. Use tracking-tight for sizes > 32px.

mono.usage: Code snippets, order IDs, technical data.

primary.description: Cobalt/Sapphire Blue - Used for the 'T' logo and primary actions.

secondary.description: Metallic Gold - Used for ratings (stars), premium badges, and subtle borders.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating modals, toast notifications.

grids.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all

cards.service: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/30 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg

general: Implement a strict DARK MODE ONLY interface.
Use 'Playfair Display' for all headings to ensure the luxury aesthetic.
Ensure the 'T' logo is always visible and uses the specific Cobalt Blue (#0047AB).
The 'Best Services' section MUST have a subtle blue background/gradient as requested.
Profile pages must follow the 3-column layout: Sidebar (Nav) | Center (Content) | Right (Reviews).
homepage: Hero section must be full-screen with the panoramic image/video background.
Navigation categories (Services, Products, etc.) should use the 'Bento Grid' layout.
Use the 'Gold' color for the 'Certified' and 'Premium' badges.
dashboard: Use Shadcn components for the admin/business dashboard but customize them to match the dark theme.
Avoid default Shadcn cards; use the custom 'card.service' style defined above.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
